name: Chilled Sweet and Sour Borsch Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 medium-sized beets (tender tops if you like)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté the onion and sausage until onions are translucent.
2. Drain off any excess grease.
3. Add beets, carrots, cabbage, lemon juice, sugar, and chicken stock to a pot. For making the stock, use 2 teaspoons of chicken bouillon or cubes dissolved in 6 cups of water if desired.
4. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
6. Once boiling, reduce the heat to maintain a gentle simmer.
7. Simmer for approximately 45 minutes until vegetables are tender.
8. Remove from heat and allow it to cool slightly.
9. Serve with a dollop of sour cream or yogurt on top along with fresh dill weed garnish.
Note: If sausage is not desired, you may omit it and season the soup to taste. For added chilliness, blend some of the hot soup with a portion of sour cream in a blender before serving. Garnish with additional sour cream or yogurt dollop and fresh dill weed.
